purpose: Future merge validation must block live apply when a paid or balance-impacting cloud financial event references an account that does not exist locally or in staged merged accounts.

expectedStagedResult.reason: Paid financial event references an account that is missing from local and staged cloud account records.

expectedReport.message: Paid or balance-impacting financial event references a missing account.

safetyNotes: Do not call transaction posting functions.
Do not infer a replacement account by name.
Keep the cloud event staged until the missing account reference is resolved.
